comment: Sample configurations for the security-scan system. Interactive use: 'security-scan' skill. Headless/batch: 'security-scan' workflow. Direct CLI: bash scripts/security-scan/run_scan.sh. Zero AI tokens in actual scanning.

example_1_single_repo.description: Scan a single repo — runs SAST + secrets + dependency + config audit.

example_2_with_dast.description: Full scan including live DAST probing with nuclei against a running instance.

example_3_quick_mode.description: Quick scan — skips DAST, runs shallow checks only. ~60% faster.

example_4_local_path.description: Scan a local directory instead of cloning from Git.

example_5_multiple_repos.description: Batch scan multiple repos in one run.

example_6_selective_scans.description: Skip specific scan domains — e.g., only run SAST + secrets.

example_7_severity_filter.description: Only report high and critical findings.

example_8_direct_cli.comment: Run directly from terminal with zero AI involvement.
